    %mul_15 : [num_users=1] = call_function[target=torch.ops.aten.mul.Tensor](args = (%_to_copy_9, %rsqrt_3), kwargs = {})
    %_to_copy_10 : [num_users=1] = call_function[target=torch.ops.aten._to_copy.default](args = (%detach_3,), kwargs = {dtype: torch.float32})
    %add_11 : [num_users=1] = call_function[target=torch.ops.aten.add.Tensor](args = (%_to_copy_10, 1.0), kwargs = {})

    %_to_copy_11 : [num_users=1] = call_function[target=torch.ops.aten._to_copy.default](args = (%mul_16,), kwargs = {dtype: torch.bfloat16})
    %_param_constant6 : [num_users=1] = get_attr[target=_param_constant6]
    %t_2 : [num_users=1] = call_function[target=torch.ops.aten.t.default](args = (%_param_constant6,), kwargs = {})
    %mm_2 : [num_users=1] = call_function[target=torch.ops.aten.mm.default](args = (%_to_copy_11, %t_2), kwargs = {})
    %empty_1 : [num_users=2] = call_function[target=torch.ops.aten.empty.memory_format](args = ([4096, 17408],), kwargs = {dtype: torch.bfloat16, device: cuda:0, pin_memory: False})
    %silu_and_mul : [num_users=0] = call_function[target=torch.ops._C.silu_and_mul.default](args = (%empty_1, %mm_2), kwargs = {})
    %_param_constant7 : [num_users=1] = get_attr[target=_param_constant7]
    %t_3 : [num_users=1] = call_function[target=torch.ops.aten.t.default](args = (%_param_constant7,), kwargs = {})
    %mm_3 : [num_users=1] = call_function[target=torch.ops.aten.mm.default](args = (%empty_1, %t_3), kwargs = {})
    return (mm_3, add_9)
